prerequisites: A NewsData.io account (register at newsdata.io/register, or log in if you already have one).
An API key, available from your NewsData.io dashboard under the API Key section after signing up.
Set the required api_key field. Optionally narrow results with the category, country, domain, and language filter fields.

authMethods.name: API Key
authMethods.summary: NewsData.io authenticates every request with a single API key. Supply it in the connector's api_key field; the API expects it as the apikey query parameter on requests to newsdata.io/api/1. The key is required on all requests.

setupSteps.title: Create or log in to a NewsData.io account
setupSteps.body: Go to newsdata.io/register and create an account, or log in with your existing credentials. A free plan is available.

setupSteps.title: Copy your API key from the dashboard
setupSteps.body: Open your NewsData.io dashboard from the top-right account menu and go to the API Key section. View and copy your personalized API key. Treat the key as a secret and do not share it.

setupSteps.title: Enter the API key in the connector
setupSteps.body: Paste the copied key into the connector's api_key field. This value is sent as the apikey query parameter to authenticate every request to the NewsData.io API.

setupSteps.title: Configure optional result filters
setupSteps.body: Optionally set the category, country, domain, and language fields to narrow which articles are returned. Leave them blank to use NewsData.io defaults.

sources.title: How to Get Your NewsData.io News API Key
